mnemonics.title: DRY-PRO Parameters
mnemonics.content: Don't Repeat Yourself - Parameter Rules Order: Defaults, *args, Keywords, **kwargs. Remember parameter order: Positional, then default, then *args, then keyword-only, then **kwargs

mnemonics.title: SCOPE Ladder
mnemonics.content: When resolving variables: Local -> Enclosing -> Global -> Built-in (LEGB). Imagine climbing a ladder from function interior to Python core

mnemonics.title: LAMBDA Lightning
mnemonics.content: Lambda = Lightning Function: Quick, single-expression, disappears after use. Like a lightning strike - brief but powerful

mnemonics.title: RETURN Recipe
mnemonics.content: Reusable Elements Transmit Useful Results Now: Every good function should RETURN something useful, like a recipe produces a dish

acronyms.expansion: Don't Repeat Yourself - Parameter Rules Order
acronyms.usage: Remember function parameter sequence: Defaults, *args, Keywords, **kwargs
Variable scope resolution order in Python

visualTips.visualization: Imagine functions as IoT sensor pods: Raw data enters, gets processed (hidden internals), clean output emerges
Visualize function parameters as IoT data pipeline: Positional args = required sensor inputs, **kwargs = optional configuration
Draw 4 concentric circles labeled L-E-G-B. Variables search inward->outward like IoT devices checking local cache before cloud
Picture lambda functions as lightning bolts: Short, fast, and ideal for quick data transformations in sensor streams

analogies.analogy: Like IoT device configuration: Required settings (positional args), optional settings (defaults), and sensor-specific options (**kwargs)
Similar to an IoT sensor payload: Packages processed data in standard format for other components to use
Like IoT network hierarchy: Local variables = device memory, Global = edge server, Built-in = cloud infrastructure
Like temporary sensor calibration formulas - used once during data preprocessing then discarded
